author: artlbv
body:
#### PR description:

This PR adds a XGBoost-based producer for the HLT topological trigger which is targeting final states with muons, HT and b-tagged jets, for example HH bbWW/tautau [as presented in this TSG meeting](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1644150/#37-paths-using-l1-topo-seeds) and in more detail [here](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1644781/#34-hlt-topo-proposal).

As the producer can be used with non-HLT collections/objects, it was proposed in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/50099 to move it to a new, dedicated `RecoML/Topology` package.

This producer is meant to be run at HLT together with the newly added `HLTFloatThresholdFilter`.
No changes are expected to any running central code. 

The data (json files) are provided in this PR: https://github.com/cms-data/HLTrigger-HLTfilters/pull/2

#### PR validation:

The producer was tested with this test script: https://gist.github.com/artlbv/a98dd93f75af97b0ab339adef59a9731
There are three different models testing the different configuration setups possible with the producer (different number of muons, sorting by pt vs by relTkIso).

In addition a unit test was added that loads one of the model files and compares the prediction to a known set of scores:
```
$CMSSW_BASE/tmp/el8_amd64_gcc13/src/RecoML/Topology/test/RecoMLTopoMuonHtPNetBXGBTest/RecoMLTopoMuonHtPNetBXGBTest
Randomness seeded to: 1709110120
===============================================================================
All tests passed (17 assertions in 1 test case)
```

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

This will be backported to 16_0_X for data taking in 2026 (targeting HLT menu v1.1)
title: HLT topological trigger based on XGBoost for events with muons, HT and btags
